title: NoMoreGhost
description: Reduces ghost totems, shield desync, and ghost healing pots.
body:
# NoMoreGhost

NoMoreGhost helps reduce combat desync issues in Minecraft PvP.

Features:

* Totem synchronization
* Shield synchronization
* Healing potion retry system
* Inventory resync improvements

Designed for:

* nethpot
* diamapot
* crystal PvP
* high ping combat

Fabric 1.21.x compatible.
Well be adding a mod for ghost gaps :>
